holdings.infoBox: KIQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are +ndxdbhio/-Fed Funds stock at 102.69%, NVIDIA at 8.67%, Apple at 7.60%, Micron Technology at 5.65%, and Microsoft at 4.91%.

overview.description: The KraneShares InspereX Nasdaq Dynamic Buffered High Income Index ETF (KIQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index that invests in the Nasdaq-100 stocks while employing a collar options strategy to generate additional income while hedging against downside risk. KIQQ was launched on Jan 6, 2026 and is issued by KraneShares.
infoTable: Nasdaq InspereX Dynamic Buffered High Income Index
